webApp.description: Signic ID is a secure crypto wallet and decentralized identity solution. Own your digital identity, manage assets across chains, and authenticate across Web3.

home.name: How to Get Started with Signic ID
home.description: Set up your decentralized identity and crypto wallet with Signic ID in a few simple steps.

steps.name: Create Your Wallet
steps.text: Download Signic ID and create a secure, non-custodial crypto wallet. Your private keys stay on your device.

steps.name: Claim Your Digital Identity
steps.text: Register your decentralized identity (DID) on-chain. This identity is cryptographically verified and controlled entirely by you.

steps.name: Add Name Services
steps.text: Link ENS, SNS, or other blockchain name services to your identity for a human-readable address across chains.

steps.name: Authenticate Across Web3
steps.text: Use your Signic ID to log in to dApps, prove credentials, and manage assets seamlessly across multiple blockchains.
